message:
fix(core): unify now_ms() pattern in approval.rs, deduplicate in storage.rs

- approval.rs: change unwrap_or(i64::MAX) to unwrap_or(0) matching all
  other now_ms() implementations for consistent failure semantics
- storage.rs: replace inline epoch computation in record_migration()
  with a call to the existing now_ms() utility function

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
